pr.title: Record: Val-Calibrated GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072×112 — val_bpb 1.1142 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Val-shard Hessian GPTQ calibration keeps the Full GPTQ+XSA-all stack legal while BigramHash(3072×112), LZMA9 compression, and Parallel Muon optimizer drive quality.
techniques: Val-data Hessian GPTQ calibration to avoid eval-time train access
BigramHash(3072×112) table plus LZMA preset=9 artifact tuning
Parallel Muon optimizer with parameter banking and overlapped communication
